rulings.Case Title: IN RE: THE KAREN RUSH REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #4, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 01/12/2021 (no earlier date available). 1) Please provide proof of reimbursement from Daniel Conrad for the double payment alleged in paragraph 4c of the petition. 2) Please provide proof of reimbursement from the petitioner for the overpayment alleged in paragraph 4c of the petition. 3) No notice was given to Gene Marchi. Did he agree not to receive any part of the underpayments alleged in paragraph 6? No waiver or consent is on file. 4) Paragraph 10 does not list the settlor's brother, while the contact information filed by the petitioner on 09/22/2020 in the related conservatorship case lists the brother. The proof of service does not show notice was given to him. 5) Paragraph 6 of the prayer for relief and proposed order request a different amount of reimbursement of costs from the amounts stated in paragraph 8 and Exhibit A. 6) The ending cash and non-cash values stated in the summary of account do not match the allocation shown on Schedules E. 7) Schedule C shows payment of fees on account to the petitioner for services rendered in January 2019 prior to this account period, for which the petitioner has already been compensated by the order approving the prior account. 8) Is the furniture rental listed on Schedule C required by Coventry Place? 9) Please provide the petitioner's time sheets for this account period. 10) Paragraph 8 alleges that the attorney's hourly rate changed in January 2020, but Exhibit A shows 3 entries in December 2019 with the new rate. 11) Exhibit A shows the attorney spent more than 5 hours on the petitioner's time sheets in support of the prior account. Is the requested compensation for this work just and reasonable? 12) The declaration filed on 12/03/2020 appears to be requesting an unlimited duration of the petitioner's authority to pay fees on account, while the petition requested a limited duration of such authority. Should the relief sought by the declaration be deemed an amendment requiring new notice?

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DAVINDER SINGH SIDHU
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/29/20. No courtesy copies. No proposed order. [LRSF 2.7 B., 14.6 A., and 14.93 G.] Original bank statements must be filed to verify the ending balances shown in an accounting. A statement about the retention of the original bank statements must also be filed by the fiduciary or the attorney retaining the originals, which statement must include the allegations required by LRSF 2.11 M.4. Courtesy copies and the proposed order must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 12/18/20 to avoid another continuance.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Set Aside Trust, For Relief From Financial Elder Abuse, And For Declatory Relief
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/29/2020 at 9:00am. Court will issue an ORDER CONTIINUING HEARING ON PETITION AND CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE; DIRECTING COMPLANCE WITH 9/8/2020 ORDER; NOTICE OF COURT MOTION FOR SANCTIONS The parties are ordered to file a Joint Case Management Statement no later than December 21, 2020 at noon. The parties are ordered to comply with the content and courtesy-copy requirements of the Order. The court now moves for an order imposing sanctions as follows: If a compliant Joint Case Management Statement is not received by the deadline set forth in this order, counsel for petitioner and respondent shall pay sanctions in the amount of $50 per court day through the date the Joint Case Management Statement is filed, unless petitioner dismisses the petition prior to the date the Statement is due.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MAUREEN MALONE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing to admit the will. No appearance required. Status on close by June 6, 2022.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CAROL ANN DODA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. No conformed copy of signed order will be returned (no self-addressed stamped envelope provided). Petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report of status of administration must be filed by 03/15/2022. If not on file, appearance required at status hearing set for 03/22/2022.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANCES LOUISE HILDEBRAND
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/29/20. No proof of publication. When second generation or more distant heirs are listed, the deceased ancestor through whom they take (or would have taken) shall be named and his or her date of death and relationship to the decedent shall be stated. [LRSF 14.26 D. and E.] Who were the decedent's parents and when did they die? Whose children are Steven James McGrath and Ralph W. McGrath and when did that sibling (or those siblings) of the decedent die? A supplement to the petition, prepared on pleading paper and signed and verified by the proposed executor, must be filed to supplement the information missing from Attachment 8. Courtesy copies of the proof of publication and the supplement must be received by the assigned Examiner by 12/18/20. (Bond will be required, as the petitioner requested bond, although the will waived bond)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: MEI YING LAU
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. counsel may be asked about the search warrants referenced in the documents filed. Remote appearance highly encouraged. Please review the 7th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their full name.
